title: commiphora edulis subsp. boiviniana
intro: Commiphora edulis subsp. boiviniana, also known as the Boivin's Commiphora, is a plant species within the family Burseraceae. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Commiphora edulis subsp. boiviniana include the reduction of fever, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Commiphora edulis subsp. boiviniana is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or taken orally under the guidance of a medical professional.
